summary: Iteration 72 - Verified Cash Book Cash In (Jama) auto-ledger fix. Auto-ledger entries now correctly use txn_type=nikasi for both Cash In and Cash Out transactions. Sale Voucher ledger_paid shows correct amounts from ledger entries.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist (404), test skipped

success_rate.backend: 91% (10/11 tests passed - health check endpoint missing)

seed_data_creation: Used existing Gayatri Agro voucher (total=35400, advance=3000, inv=IB-1). Created/deleted test entries for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Cash Book auto-ledger fix is working correctly. When creating Cash In (Jama) or Cash Out (Nikasi) entries in Cash Book with a party category, the system automatically creates a corresponding ledger entry with txn_type='nikasi' (always nikasi, regardless of the parent txn_type). This is correct because: (1) Cash In from party = party paid us = reduces their debt = Ledger Nikasi, (2) Cash Out to party = we paid them = reduces our debt = Ledger Nikasi. The Sale Voucher listing now correctly shows ledger_paid and ledger_balance computed from ledger entries. Gayatri Agro voucher shows total=35400, ledger_paid=35400, ledger_balance=0 (Paid badge visible).

test_cash_out_nikasi_creates_ledger_nikasi - PASSED: Cash Out (nikasi) also creates auto-ledger with txn_type=nikasi
test_existing_gayatri_agro_voucher - PASSED: Found voucher with correct data
test_sale_voucher_api_returns_ledger_paid_field - PASSED: API returns ledger_paid and ledger_balance
test_party_summary_returns_correct_format - PASSED: Party Summary has correct structure

test_dc_entries_api - PASSED: DC Entries API works correctly
test_dc_delivery_creates_entries - PASSED: DC Delivery still creates cash_transactions
test_e2e_sale_voucher_cash_in_payment - PASSED: Full E2E flow works

bug_fix_rca.issue: Cash Book Cash In for sale voucher party not reflecting in Sale Voucher paid status and Party Ledger
bug_fix_rca.root_cause: Auto-ledger entry was copying the parent txn_type (jama for Cash In), but should always be nikasi because any cash movement represents a payment settlement
fix_applied: cashbook.py Line 135: ledger_entry['txn_type'] = 'nikasi' (hardcoded, not copied from parent)
private_trading.py Line 1185-1270: _get_party_summary uses ledger entries for paid calculation
bug_fix_rca.verification: Backend tests confirmed auto-ledger entries have txn_type=nikasi for both Cash In and Cash Out. E2E test confirmed sale voucher shows correct ledger_paid after manual Cash In payment.
